title: Welding Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for estimating total welding cost per weld, incorporating labor, consumables, energy, overhead, and quality loss drivers. Aligned with ISO 3834, AWS D1.1, and Lean Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Weld Length (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the weld joint to be deposited.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the weld joint to be deposited.

inputs.label: Weld Throat Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Effective throat thickness of the fillet or groove weld.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective throat thickness of the fillet or groove weld.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köşe veya oluk kaynağının etkin boğaz kalınlığı.

inputs.label: Material Density (g/cm³)
inputs.businessContext: Density of the base and filler material (typical steel ~7.85).

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the base and filler material (typical steel ~7.85).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taban ve dolgu malzemesinin yoğunluğu (tipik çelik ~7.85).

inputs.label: Deposition Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of deposited weld metal to total filler metal consumed (includes spatter and losses).

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of deposited weld metal to total filler metal consumed (includes spatter and losses).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biriktirilen kaynak metalinin tüketilen toplam dolgu metaline oranı (sıçrama ve kayıplar dahil).

inputs.label: Labor Rate (USD/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for welder.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for welder.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynakçı için tam yüklü saatlik işçilik maliyeti.

inputs.label: Welding Speed (mm/min)
inputs.businessContext: Travel speed of the welding torch along the joint.

businessContext_i18n.en: Travel speed of the welding torch along the joint.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak torcunun birleşme hattı boyunca ilerleme hızı.

inputs.label: Filler Wire Cost (USD/kg)
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilogram of filler wire or electrode.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kilogram of filler wire or electrode.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolgu teli veya elektrotun kilogram başına maliyeti.

inputs.label: Shielding Gas Cost (USD/L)
inputs.businessContext: Cost per liter of shielding gas (e.g., Argon/CO2 mix).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per liter of shielding gas (e.g., Argon/CO2 mix).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Litre başına koruyucu gaz maliyeti (örn. Argon/CO2 karışımı).

rules.message: Weld length and throat thickness must be positive.
Deposition efficiency must be between 50% and 100%.
Rework rate must be between 0% and 50%.
Gas flow rate must be between 5 and 50 L/min.

thresholds.message: Labor rate exceeds $80/h. Consider process automation or skill mix optimization.
Deposition efficiency below 70%. Investigate spatter, wire feed issues, or parameter settings.
Rework rate above 10%. Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defects.
Energy cost per kWh exceeds $0.20. Consider energy-efficient welding equipment.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
